owner: akiendelllinux_cc_0 (CC) — CC gates writes to this node; the default-to-200K policy is Akien's ratified intent.
intention: A bare `superclaude` (no flags) launches at 200K by default — flip FILE_DEFAULT_200K 0→1.
why: Claude cannot self-trigger /compact, so at 1M the context balloons past Akien's notification threshold before he is alerted during heavy buildout. Defaulting to 200K makes stewardship of resources a property of the system (physics), not of anyone remembering to pass --200k (discipline). --1m still opts up for big-design stretches; command line always wins.
traces_to: Telos 6 (make life suck less / good stewardship)
gates: proof gate (tester) — IOU: tester not built. Interim proof: hand-run launchers/proofs/PROOF.md (the --dry-run cases), culminating in Akien's restart measurement, filed as a VALIDATION when VALIDATIONS store exists.
validation: 2026-07-15, measured live: after exit+restart, a bare `superclaude` (no flags) awoke at 200K — confirmed via /context (50.1k/200k). The file default won (no --1m, no env override). This is the falsifier the --dry-run cases could not reach (Law 3); it passed. Recorded here inline until the VALIDATIONS store exists; also in launchers/proofs/PROOF.md.
falsifier: on the next restart, a no-flag `superclaude` comes up in 200K. Wrong-intent signal: 200K chokes buildout tickets often enough (context ceilings hit mid-ticket) that the stewardship win is outweighed — the --1m escape hatch makes this cheap to test without reverting.
horizon: re-check after a stretch of buildout work at 200K.
touches: launchers/superclaude — FILE_DEFAULT_200K 0→1 + enrich the WHY comment
launchers/intention+why.json — enrich context_switch.why with the stewardship reason
launchers/proofs/PROOF.md — flip the two default-dependent lines in lockstep (bare-launch case → 200K; live-proof line → 200K)
provenance: cast 2026-07-15 via /intent → /sorted; first code-seam node. Completeness check caught the PROOF.md proof-dependency (a code change that moved code but not its proof would be a hollow build).
